name: Carta de Invitación México
description: Generates formal PDF invitation letters (carta de invitación) for Mexican immigration. Used as supporting documentation for visa applications, immigration checkpoints, and consulate appointments. Letters are personalized with host and traveler data, relationship details, itinerary, and accommodation information.

plans.name: Plan Esencial
plans.description: Single traveler with basic itinerary. Includes host and traveler details, relationship, travel purpose, accommodation, and dates.

plans.name: Plan Completo
plans.description: Supports multiple travelers (companions), multi-destination itinerary with per-destination accommodation, entry/exit transport details, financial responsibility breakdown, and in-Mexico transportation modes.
